title: Philibertia tucumanensis

This family is part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other families such as Rubiaceae and Loganiaceae. The genus Philibertia is a group of flowering plants native to South America, and Philibertia tucumanensis is one of the species within this genus. The classification of Philibertia tucumanensis is further specified as a species within the subgenus Philibertia. This complex classification system helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species.
